input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-long-full-lifecycle-01-e9eab7db-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS get pods
echo "---USERS---"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_users
echo "---PERM /app---"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_permissions -p /app
echo "---PERM /ops---"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_permissions -p /ops

input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-long-full-lifecycle-01-e9eab7db-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl set_permissions -p /app app-user '.*' '.*' '.*'

kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl clear_permissions -p /app ops-user

input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-long-full-lifecycle-01-e9eab7db-cluster-a
echo "---PERM /app---"; kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_permissions -p /app
echo "---PERM /ops---"; kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_permissions -p /ops
echo "---restart clients---"
kubectl -n $NS rollout restart deploy app-client ops-client
sleep 20
kubectl -n $NS get pods
